content.full_text:
Contribution or gift

If legal services are paid for with personal funds they are usually deemed personal rather than political in nature. If funds are raised, then the standard set forth in the Hongisto letter is applicable, i.e., are the funds raised unrelated to the filer's status as a candidate or officeholder and used solely for personal purposes.
